description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a slightly weathered and worn surface, indicating frequent use or exposure to urban environments. The body features a large, white instruction label with red and black graphics and text, partially scuffed but still legible, located on the front. A black rubber or plastic hose is attached near the top, looping downward and secured to the side with a molded holder. The top assembly includes a metallic handle and lever mechanism, as well as a visible safety pin and a circular component that may house a pressure gauge. A black mounting strap encircles the midsection, likely for securing the extinguisher to a wall or bracket. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, suitable for emergency use in public or private urban spaces.
description: A weathered red fire extinguisher with a prominent instruction label, black hose, and metallic handle, featuring a mounting strap and safety pin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instruction label, hose, handle, and safety pin clearly.
description_view_1: Rear view with the label partially visible on the side and the top handle assembly seen from behind.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the cylindrical body, black mounting strap, and the hose secured along the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hose running down the length of the extinguisher and the back of the mounting strap.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large, white rectangular instruction label with red and black graphics and text on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black mounting strap encircles the midsection, likely for securing the extinguisher to a wall or bracket.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, loops downward, and is secured to the side with a molded holder.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A small circular component is present at the top, which may be a pressure gauge, but no clear markings or colors are visible.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle assembly.
